product_updates.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
product_updates.content: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

product_updates.title: OpenAI reveals more details about its agreement with the Pentagon
product_updates.content: By CEO Sam Altman’s own admission, OpenAI’s deal with the Department of Defense was “definitely rushed,” and “the optics don’t look good.”

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Claude rises to No. 1 in the App Store following Pentagon dispute
product_updates.content: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.

product_updates.title: SaaS in, SaaS out: Here’s what’s driving the SaaSpocalypse
product_updates.content: What's behind the SaaSpocalypse? It simply seems a new supreme has risen.

product_updates.title: The trap Anthropic built for itself
product_updates.content: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind and others have long promised to govern themselves responsibly. Now, in the absence of rules, there's not a lot to protect them.
